tasks.subject: Task 1: Database schema + env vars
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the workspace_wikis Drizzle schema, run the migration, and wire three new env vars for folder9.

**Files:**
- Create: apps/server/libs/database/src/schemas/wiki/workspace-wikis.ts
- Create: apps/server/libs/database/src/schemas/wiki/index.ts
- Modify: apps/server/libs/database/src/schemas/index.ts
- Modify: apps/server/libs/shared/src/env.ts
- Generated: apps/server/libs/database/migrations/XXXX_add_workspace_wikis.sql

**Verify:** pnpm --filter @team9/server db:push --dry-run && pnpm --filter @team9/server exec tsc --noEmit

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/server/libs/database/src/schemas/wiki/workspace-wikis.ts","apps/server/libs/database/src/schemas/wiki/index.ts","apps/server/libs/database/src/schemas/index.ts","apps/server/libs/shared/src/env.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter @team9/server db:push --dry-run && pnpm --filter @team9/server exec tsc --noEmit","acceptanceCriteria":["workspace_wikis table exists after pnpm db:migrate","wiki_approval_mode and wiki_permission_level enums created","unique indexes on (workspace_id, slug) and folder9_folder_id","env.FOLDER9_API_URL/PSK/WEBHOOK_SECRET available","pnpm build:server passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Folder9ClientService + internal types
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Typed fetch-based client that the gateway uses to talk to folder9, with PSK header, error mapping, 100% coverage.

**Files:**
- Create: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/wikis/folder9-client.service.ts
- Create: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/wikis/types/folder9.types.ts
- Create: apps/server/apps/gateway/src/wikis/__tests__/folder9-client.service.spec.ts

**Verify:** pnpm --filter @team9/server test -- folder9-client.service.spec --coverage

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/wikis/folder9-client.service.ts","apps/server/apps/gateway/src/wikis/types/folder9.types.ts","apps/server/apps/gateway/src/wikis/__tests__/folder9-client.service.spec.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm --filter @team9/server test -- folder9-client.service.spec --coverage","acceptanceCriteria":["Typed methods for every folder9 endpoint the gateway needs","Every request includes the PSK header","Non-2xx throws Folder9ApiError; network errors throw Folder9NetworkError","100% unit coverage"]}
```
